title: Radio Frequency Identification Device Specialists
description: Design and implement radio frequency identification device (RFID) systems used to track shipments or goods.

tasks.text: Identify operational requirements for new systems to inform selection of technological solutions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Integrate tags, readers, or software in radio frequency identification device (RFID) designs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform systems analysis or programming of radio frequency identification device (RFID) technology.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test radio frequency identification device (RFID) software to ensure proper functioning.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select appropriate radio frequency identification device (RFID) tags and determine placement locations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform site analyses to determine system configurations, processes to be impacted, or on-site obstacles to technology implementation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform acceptance testing on newly installed or updated systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine means of integrating radio frequency identification device (RFID) into other applications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide technical support for radio frequency identification device (RFID) technology.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect data about existing client hardware, software, networking, or key business processes to inform implementation of radio frequency identification device (RFID) technology.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install, test, or maintain radio frequency identification device (RFID) systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test tags or labels to ensure readability.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine usefulness of new radio frequency identification device (RFID) technologies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify compliance of developed applications with architectural standards and established practices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train users in details of system operation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop process flows, work instructions, or standard operating procedures for radio frequency identification device (RFID) systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read current literature, attend meetings or conferences, or talk with colleagues to stay abreast of industry research about new technologies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Document equipment or process details of radio frequency identification device (RFID) technology.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Define and compare possible radio frequency identification device (RFID) solutions to inform selection for specific projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create simulations or models of radio frequency identification device (RFID) systems to provide information for selection and configuration.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze radio frequency identification device (RFID)-related supply chain data.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
